description: Sentinel file. Presence + matching `template` field means this repo was bootstrapped from the agentic-dev-boilerplate template via `create-agentic-dev`. Used by the installer (cli/install.ts) to relax the repo-identity check, and by the CLI to detect in-repo invocations (--here mode). Tracked in git. Runtime install state lives in `.template/installer.state.json` (gitignored).
